creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

After testing your patch I'm not sure the reason for this change:

-@dirrm share/converseen
+@dirrmtry share/converseen

IMHO it should stay dirrm, there should be nothing left behind in share 
from removed ports. Is it ok if I leave it as a @dirrm?

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
